---
title: "Contact SafeNLP"
---

Have a question, collaboration idea, or just want to say hello? Don't hesitate to reach out — we'd love to connect.

:::{#contact}

#### {{< fa envelope >}} &nbsp; contact@safenlp.org

#### {{< fa brands linkedin >}} &nbsp; [linkedin.com/company/safenlp](https://www.linkedin.com/company/safenlp)

:::

<br>
